message:
Dear Agent {{ doc.agent }},

Policy {{ doc.policy }} for customer {{ doc.customer }} is due for renewal on {{ doc.renewal_due_date }}.

Renewal Amount: ₹{{ doc.renewal_amount }}

Please contact the customer immediately to ensure timely renewal.
name: Policy Renewal Reminder
subject: ⚠️ Policy Renewal Due in 30 Days — {{ doc.policy }}
